name: class-homepage
description: Obsidian class-management homepage plugin and vault scaffold

scripts.test: npm run test:plugin && npm run test:guardrails && npm run test:rag && npm run test:omniforge
scripts.check: npm run validate:plugin-release && npm run validate:frontmatter && npm run preflight:sharenote && npm run build
scripts.check:plugin: npm run validate:plugin-release && npm run test:plugin
scripts.build:quartz: echo 'Quartz runtime is not bundled in this offline scaffold. Sync official Quartz 4 source, then run: npx quartz build' && exit 1
